creator: Alexander88207@protonmail.com
text:
Hello,

i would like to point out that wulf7 did some work to backport fixes to 5.15 drm which have been not completely merged in ports.

With all respect: The version in ports is still busted even with the vanilla merge of that.

I do only care about 5.15 because its right now the last version where Variable Refresh Rate works correctly, but otherwise its also possible to use drm-61 if you don't care about that, there are the panics fixed as well.

I do use this branch for a very long time now and have not gotten any panics since then:

https://github.com/wulf7/drm-kmod/tree/5.15-lts-focal

Using it with RX 6700 XT and FreeBSD 14.1-STABLE (Sep) (stable/14-b8aeb7101)
